title: Light Flip: the $299 anti-AI flip phone with no touchscreen
summary: Light, the Brooklyn maker of deliberately boring phones, has unveiled the Light Flip, its first clamshell and its fourth device in a decade. The Light Flip runs LightOS, the company’s stripped-back operating system, showing white text on a black screen.
caption: output/2026-07-22/light-flip-the-299-anti-ai-flip-phone-with-no-touchscreen.txt
